hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git push' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'dev-ai'; then branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" != "dev-ai" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Solo se permite hacer push a la rama dev-ai. Rama actual: '"$branch"'"}'; exit 0; fi; fi; echo '{"decision":"allow"}'
